headline: Zoetis CEO Kristin Peck on screwworm: The food supply is safe
summary: Zoetis CEO Kristin Peck joins CNBC's 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss concerns over the flesh-eating screwworm outbreak in the U.S., whether Canada overreacted by announcing a temporary ban on Texas livestock, and more.

headline: Zoetis (ZTS) Receives UK Approval for Long-Acting Osteoarthritis Pain Therapy Lenivia
summary: Zoetis Inc. (NYSE:ZTS) is one of the oversold stocks to buy right now. On May 28, Zoetis received approval from the UK’s Veterinary Medicines Directorate for Lenivia (izenivetmab), a new long-acting monoclonal antibody therapy for alleviating osteoarthritis pain in dogs. Administered as a single injection, the treatment targets nerve growth factor to provide effective pain […]
